nation: Fort Alexander Indian Band (o/a Sagkeeng First Nation)
economic_notes: Nation operates Sagkeeng Superstore, gaming (VLT and bingo), telecommunications, and economic development segments. Gaming revenue net of payouts reported.
notes: Audit is qualified due to non-identification of Asset Retirement Obligation (ARO) liabilities as required under PS 3280 adopted April 1, 2022. Nation consolidated 13 entities including Fort Alexander Holdings Inc., Fort Alexander Health Centre Inc., George M. Guimond Care Centre Inc., Sagkeeng Superstore, and others. Construction in progress of $17,644,672 is shown separately from tangible capital assets. Bingo revenues are negative (-$855,520) for 2023. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + CMHC + Province of Manitoba + Service Canada = 59,060,103 + 952,339 + 455,335 + 1,829,802 = 62,297,579. OSR = total revenue minus total government transfers = 77,359,014 - 62,297,579 = 15,061,435. Schedule of remuneration not included in provided text.
